automation.name: Octodrop Billing - Email Invoice
automation.description: When a user clicks Email Invoice, send the latest generated invoice PDF to the linked client and mark the invoice sent.

inputs.subject: Invoice {{ trigger.record.fields['invoice_number'] if trigger.record.fields['invoice_number'] is defined else trigger.record_id }}
inputs.body_html:
Hi {{ trigger.record.fields['contact_name'] if trigger.record.fields['contact_name'] is defined else (trigger.record.fields['contact_id_label'] if trigger.record.fields['contact_id_label'] is defined else 'there') }},

Please find invoice {{ trigger.record.fields['invoice_number'] if trigger.record.fields['invoice_number'] is defined else trigger.record_id }} attached.

Thanks,
Octodrop
inputs.body_text:
Hi {{ trigger.record.fields['contact_name'] if trigger.record.fields['contact_name'] is defined else (trigger.record.fields['contact_id_label'] if trigger.record.fields['contact_id_label'] is defined else 'there') }},

Please find invoice {{ trigger.record.fields['invoice_number'] if trigger.record.fields['invoice_number'] is defined else trigger.record_id }} attached.

Thanks,
Octodrop
